heading: Register a new Atlas Account
body:
Select a tab based on how you would like to register your account:

Atlas CLI

To register with Atlas using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas auth register [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas auth register](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-auth-register).

Atlas UI

Email Address

- Provide the following information about yourself:

  - **Email Address**

  - **First Name**

  - **Last Name**

  - **Password**

    > **Note:** 
    >
    > Atlas
    >
    >  Password Policy
    >
    > Your Atlas **user account** password must:
    >
    > - Contain at least eight characters.
    >
    > - Exclude your email address and Atlas username.
    >
    > - Differ from your previous twenty four passwords.
    >
    > - Differ from the most commonly used passwords.

  - (Optional) **Company Name**

- Review the
  [Terms of Service](https://www.mongodb.com/cloud-terms-and-conditions?tck=docs) and
  the [Privacy Policy](https://www.mongodb.com/legal/privacy-policy?tck=docs_atlas).

- Click the checkbox to accept the Terms and Policy.

- Verify that you're not a robot.

- Click **Sign up**.

GitHub Account

- Click **GitHub**.

- Follow the GitHub prompts to sign in.

- Review the **Terms of Service** and the
  **Privacy Policy**.

- Select the checkbox to accept the
  **Terms of Service** and the
  **Privacy Policy**.

- Click **Submit**.

Google Account

- Click **Google**.

- Follow the Google prompts to sign in.

- Review the **Terms of Service** and the
  **Privacy Policy**.

- Select the checkbox to accept the
  **Terms of Service** and the
  **Privacy Policy**.

- Click **Submit**.
